item.description: A deep Major League Baseball betting backtest comparing underdog money line bets versus +1.5 run line bets across 2,223 model plays. See yearly ROI, price buckets, home and road splits, and why the money line beat the run line.

item.title: France vs Morocco World Cup Quarterfinal Analysis | BetLegend
item.description: France vs Morocco 2026 World Cup quarterfinal at Boston Stadium in Foxborough on July 9, 4:00 PM ET. France carry a perfect group stage and a 14-goals-in-five-matches attack led by Kylian Mbappe. Morocco arrive off a penalty win over the Netherlands and a 3-0 rout of Canada. Full analysis, tournament form, injuries, head-to-head history, and market snapshot.

item.title: World Cup Quarterfinals Are Set: The Last Eight | BetLegend
item.description: World Cup quarterfinal preview for July 8, 2026: a rest day sets up France vs Morocco, Spain vs Belgium, Norway vs England and Argentina vs Switzerland. Bracket, venues and keys to the last eight, analysis only.

item.title: Yankees vs Rays: An AL East Showdown At The Trop | BetLegend
item.description: Yankees vs Rays analysis, stats and preview for July 8, 2026. The division-leading Rays and a red-hot Junior Caminero host a reeling, Judge-less Yankees club as Shane McClanahan faces Gerrit Cole at Tropicana Field. Verified pitching, records and keys to victory, analysis only.

item.title: Brewers Moneyline and a Nationals Team Total Over | BetLegend
item.description: Two MLB plays for July 8: the Brewers moneyline behind Kyle Harrison against the Cardinals at Busch Stadium, and a Nationals team total over against the Astros. Three and a half units.

item.title: Yankees-Rays, Giants-Blue Jays and Twins Unders | BetLegend
item.description: Five MLB unders for July 8: Giants-Blue Jays under 7 behind Cease and Webb at Oracle, Yankees-Rays under 7 with McClanahan, a Twins team total under, a Blue Jays team total under, and Rangers-Angels under 7.5. 10.5 units.

item.title: MLB Tuesday Board: Full 15-Game Slate | BetLegend
item.description: MLB preview and analysis for July 7, 2026: a full 15-game Tuesday board headlined by Paul Skenes, Jacob deGrom, Tarik Skubal and Zack Wheeler, plus a Brewers-Cardinals doubleheader. Verified starters, records and matchup context, analysis only.

item.title: World Cup Round of 16: Argentina and Colombia Ties | BetLegend
item.description: World Cup Round of 16 analysis for July 7, 2026: Argentina meet Egypt in Atlanta and Switzerland face Colombia in Vancouver on the final day of the round of 16. Knockout-stage context and keys to victory, analysis only.

item.title: Angels vs Rangers: deGrom vs Soriano Pitchers' Duel | BetLegend
item.description: Angels vs Rangers analysis, stats and preview for July 7, 2026. Jacob deGrom and his 3.48 ERA host Jose Soriano and the majors-worst Angels offense at Globe Life Field. Verified pitching, records and keys to victory, analysis only.

item.title: Braves, Athletics, Angels Unders and a Rangers NRFI | BetLegend
item.description: Nine MLB unders for July 7: Athletics and Angels team total unders behind Tarik Skubal and Jacob deGrom, a Braves under versus Paul Skenes, plus a Rangers first-inning NRFI. 12.5 units.

item.title: Dodgers Run Line, White Sox and Giants Moneylines | BetLegend
item.description: Three MLB sides for July 7: the Dodgers -1.5 run line behind Justin Wrobleski, the White Sox as a home underdog over Boston, and the Giants moneyline at Oracle Park. Three units.

item.title: MLB Tuesday Pitching Board: Skubal, deGrom, Sanchez | BetLegend
item.description: MLB analysis for Tuesday June 30, 2026. A full 15-game board headlined by Tarik Skubal at Yankee Stadium, Jacob deGrom in Cleveland, and Cristopher Sanchez hosting the Pirates, plus Dodgers-Athletics, Padres-Cubs, Rays-Royals, and the rest of the slate.

item.title: World Cup Round of 32 Tuesday: France, Mexico, Norway | BetLegend
item.description: World Cup 2026 Round of 32 Tuesday June 30. Ivory Coast vs Norway 1 PM ET at AT&T Stadium in Dallas, France vs Sweden 5 PM ET at MetLife Stadium with France a heavy favorite, Mexico vs Ecuador 9 PM ET at Estadio Azteca. Three knockout-round fixtures, full analysis and venues.

item.title: MLB Unders Board: Seven Run-Prevention Totals | BetLegend
item.description: Seven MLB unders on one card: Pirates team total under 3.5, Rangers/Guardians under 8, Tigers/Yankees under 7, Tigers team total under 3.5, Angels team total under 3.5, Mets/Blue Jays under 8, and Giants/Diamondbacks under 9. Skubal, deGrom, Schlittler, Sanchez and Woo drive the numbers.

item.title: Pirates vs Phillies Stats Preview and Game Breakdown | BetLegend
item.description: Featured Game of the Day: Pittsburgh Pirates at Philadelphia Phillies. Deep analysis of Cristopher Sanchez, rookie Bubba Chandler, the lineups, Citizens Bank Park, advanced context, lines, and keys to victory for June 30, 2026.

item.title: Dodgers, Brewers ML, Phillies Run Line, Braves Over Pick | BetLegend
